CREATE TABLE test_dict (key VARCHAR(255), value VARCHAR(255));
SELECT dict_size(TO_DICT(SELECT key, value FROM test_dict)) AS num_items;
INSERT INTO test_dict (key, value) VALUES (NULL, NULL);
SELECT dict_size(TO_DICT(SELECT key, value FROM test_dict WHERE key IS NOT NULL)) AS num_items_not_null;
CREATE TABLE other_dict (key VARCHAR(255), value VARCHAR(255));
SELECT dict_size(TO_DICT(SELECT key FROM (SELECT * FROM test_dict UNION SELECT * FROM other_dict) AS combined_dict)) AS num_items_combined;
